strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React work at Optilyz and re:cinq
Direct AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the résumé
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated/limited (robotics work in 2016–2018)
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named explicitly; testing tooling cited is largely D-language and Selenium
response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node/React fullstack delivery, testing expertise, cloud/containerization, databases, multi-language proficiency, and AI agent development. The candidate shows concrete evidence on nearly all: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, Node/GraphQL with TDD and CI/CD at RIDE, Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective, and MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq — a rare direct match for the AI-agent requirement. Multi-language breadth (TS, D, C++, Java, Swift, PHP) satisfies the polyglot requirement, and a CS bachelor's covers the degree qualification. Gaps are narrow: Nest.js is unmentioned, Kotlin is absent, and the specific test runners (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) are not cited, though his demonstrated testing craftsmanship (test-framework author, TDD practitioner, Selenium instructor) suggests fast ramp-up. Evidence strongly supports fit with minor framework-specific gaps.
